findings.title: Dead function isSpecWeaveFrameworkRepo left in init.ts
findings.issue: Function defined but never called after simplification

findings.title: Hooks config template used non-existent sync_external_tools key
findings.issue: Template had sync_external_tools which doesn't exist in HookConfiguration type
findings.suggestion: Align template with actual type definition
findings.impact: Template serves as reference - wrong keys would confuse developers

findings.title: sync_living_docs in post_increment_planning was redundant
findings.issue: At planning time, spec.md is still being written by agents - living docs sync would skip or produce incomplete output. The actual sync is triggered by Step 5 of /sw:increment.
findings.impact: Redundant sync call at wrong lifecycle point

fixedDuringGrill: Fixed config.json.template to use actual HookConfiguration keys
